name: ds9
description: Install SAOImage DS9 8.7 astronomical imaging and data visualization application. DS9 is a standalone app (no real installer); the Windows 'Install.exe' is a self-extracting zip that we extract to C:\Program Files\SAOImageDS9 with the in-box tar.exe, then drop a Start Menu shortcut, and register the .fits/.fit/.fts file association to DS9 (overriding ASI Studio etc.).
